sources.title: The Bet (Full Movie) Comedy, 2016
sources.description:
A down on his luck man gets into an absurd but high stakes bet where he has one summer to find, and hook up with, every girl he had a crush on from 1st to 12th grade.

Director: Ryan Ederer
Writers: Aaron Goldberg, Chris Jay
Stars: Alex Klein, Brian Atkinson, Amanda Clayton
2016

Edited for YouTube ad standards
